caption: A news segment titled "PLUS POLITICS" features a man wearing a dark suit, a light-colored shirt, and a reddish-brown tie. He is positioned on the left side of the screen, speaking and gesturing with his hands. To his right is a smaller inset window showing another man wearing a traditional red cap. On-screen text in the inset identifies the guest as "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," a "POLITICAL ANALYST" located in "LAGOS," under the heading "ON THE PHONE." A bold headline across the bottom of the screen reads "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU." The background consists of blue and teal graphic circles and a red-patterned backdrop. Various logos and links are visible, including "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA," "PLUSTVAFRICA," "DStv CH 408," "StarTimes CH 308," and "WWW.PLUSTVAFRICA.COM/LIVE-TV." The scene remains consistent across the frames, with only slight changes in the speaker's hand gestures and facial expressions as he continues talking.
